text: Back in 1951, k-Nearest Neighbors (kNN) algorithm was first introduced, and since then, kNN has become one of the most commonly used data mining techniques in recommendation systems, Internet of Things (IoT) and so on. Therefore, this paper focuses on reviewing advanced algorithms of exact kNN Search and kNN Join methods for high-dimensional data. After reviewing 31 kNN search methods and 12 kNN join methods, a comprehensive summary of methods, characteristics and their applications and limitations are given, which may facilitate a better understanding of the kNN algorithm. With respect to experimentation, the source codes of the aforementioned kNN algorithms are provided, so that readers could have a trial and comparison. According to the current research situation, kNN is increasingly used in the high-dimensional data, and there lacks a systematic summary on the advancements of exact kNN techniques. The research in this paper aims at making up for this lack. Also, the existing challenges and possible development directions of kNN algorithm are analyzed, in order to provide an integrated summary of kNN methods after comparison and classification.
headline: Fully Human Written
